result.markdown: --- execute: echo: false freeze: auto knitr: opts_chunk: collapse: true results: false warnings: false --- ### Current Lab Members ::: column-margin Marty's image is from the [McGill Tribune](https://tinyurl.com/55wf3bae). ::: ::: {#members layout-ncol="5"} [![Suresh Krishna](images/sureshsm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Suresh"}](#suresh) [![Katarzyna Jurewicz](images/kasia.png){fig-alt="Photo of Kasia"}](#kasia) [![Yohai-Eliel Berreby](images/yohaism2.png){fig-alt="Photo of Yohai"}](#yohai) [![Amanda Pruss](images/marty2.png){fig-alt="Photo of Marty"}](#amanda) [![Haoxiang Liu](images/haoxiangsm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Haoxiang"}](#haoxiang) [![Oren Gurevitch](images/orensm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Oren"}](#oren) [![Buxin Liao](images/buxinsm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Buxin"}](#buxin) [![Chen Liu](images/chensm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Chen"}](#chen) [![Noa Kemp](images/noasm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Noa"}](#noa) [![Anais Rubsamen](images/anaissm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Anais"}](#anais) [![Youzhi Huang](images/youzhism.png){fig-alt="Photo of Youzhi"}](#youzhi) [![Alexandru Tecu](images/alexandrusm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Alexandru"}](#alexandru) [![Bradley Austin-Keiller](images/bradleysm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Bradley"}](#bradley) ::: ### Current undergraduate observers ::: {#observers layout-ncol="5"} [![Yavuz Shahzad](images/yavuzsm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Yavuz"}](#yavuz) [![Lilia Fernane](images/marty2.png){fig-alt="Photo of Marty"}](#lilia) ::: ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Suresh Krishna ::: column-margin ![](images/sureshsm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Suresh" width="200"} ::: - Associate Professor, Department of Physiology, McGill. - MBBS (Med School), AIIMS, New Delhi; PhD, NYU, New York. - Spent time at Columbia University, CNRS (Lyon), German Primate Center (Goettingen), MPI for Human Development (Berlin), before coming to McGill (Jan 2020). - [Email](mailto:suresh.krishna@mcgill.ca); Personal web-page: TBA; [Google Scholar](https://tinyurl.com/48dfzjuk) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Katarzyna (Kasia) Jurewicz ::: column-margin ![](images/kasia.png){fig-alt="Photo of Kasia" width="200"} ::: - Post-doctoral fellow, Department of Physiology, McGill. - MSc in Psychology, University of Warsaw; PhD in Neurobiology, Nencki Institute of Experimental Biology, Polish Academy of Sciences, Warsaw. - Previously, I was a post-doc in Dr. Becket Ebitz' lab (Noise lab) at Université de Montréal. Earlier, I conducted research in Dr. Ewa Kublik's Cortico-Thalamic Group at the Nencki Institute of Experimental Biology. My PhD work was supervised by Prof. Andrzej Wróbel in the Laboratory of the Visual System at Nencki. - [Email](mailto:katarzyna.jurewicz@mcgill.ca); Personal web-page: TBA; [Google Scholar](http://www.tinyurl.com/kjurewicz-scholar) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Yohaï-Eliel Berreby ::: column-margin ![](images/yohaism2.png){fig-alt="Photo of Yohai" width="200"} ::: - M.Sc. student, Department of Physiology, McGill - *Diplôme d'Ingénieur* (combined B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Engineering), Télécom Paris, Palaiseau, France - MPSI/MP CPGE (Math/Physics [*Classes Préparatoires aux Grandes Écoles*](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Classe_pr%C3%A9paratoire_aux_grandes_%C3%A9coles)), Lycée Hoche, Versailles, France - [Email](mailto:yohai-eliel.berreby@mail.mcgill.ca), [GitHub](https://github.com/yberreby/), [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/yberreby) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Amanda Pruss * M.Sc. Student, Integrated Program in Neuroscience, McGill. * B.A. in Psychology, McGill. * I am also very interested in applying my knowledge in neuroscience in a clinical setting as well, in an effort to help people with conditions related to vision, attention, or epilepsy. * [Email](mailto: amanda.pruss@mail.mcgill.ca), [GitHub](https://github.com/amandapruss), [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/amanda-pruss-a78813261/) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Haoxiang Liu ::: column-margin ![](images/haoxiangsm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Haoxiang" width="200"} ::: - M.Sc. Student, Department of Physiology, McGill. - M.Eng. Student, Biomedical Engineering, University of Electronic Science and Technology of China, Chengdu, China. - B.Eng. in Network Engineering, University of Electronic Science and Technology of China, Chengdu, China. - [Email](mailto:haoxiang.liu@mail.mcgill.ca), [GitHub](https://github.com/hxliu4mcgill) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Oren Gurevitch ::: column-margin ![](images/orensm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Oren" width="200"} ::: - M.Sc. Student, Department of Physiology, McGill. - B.Sc. in Neuroscience, Bar-Ilan University, Ramat Gan, Israel. - Previously, I was a research assistant working on sensory processing using rats, at Bar-Ilan University under Professor Adam Zaidel. Before that, as a lab assistant at the Weizmann Institute of Science, I worked on Multiple Sclerosis research with Professor Idit Shachar. - [Email](mailto:oren.gurevitch@mail.mcgill.ca), [GitHub](https://github.com/OrenGurevitch), [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/oren-gurevitch/) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Buxin Liao ::: column-margin ![](images/buxinsm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Buxin" width="200"} ::: - M.Sc. Student, Department of Physiology, McGill. - M.Eng. Student, Biomedical Engineering, University of Electronic Science and Technology of China, Chengdu, China. - B.Eng. in Biomedical Engineering, Southeast University, Nanjing, China. - [Email](mailto:buxin.liao@mail.mcgill.ca), [GitHub](https://github.com/D-Fonauton) ------------------------------------------------------ #### Chen Liu ::: column-margin ![](images/chensm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Chen" width="200"} ::: * M.Sc. Student, Integrated Program in Neuroscience, McGill. * M.Eng. Student, Biomedical Engineering, University of Electronic Science and Technology of China, Chengdu, China. * B.A. in Environmental Engineering, Notheastern University, China * I am interested in EEG technology's development and BCI methods' research * [Email](mailto:chen.liu6@mail.mcgill.ca) ----------------------------------------------------------- #### Noa Kemp ::: column-margin ![](images/noasm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Noa" width="200"} ::: * M.Sc. Student, Department of Physiology, McGill. * B.Sc. in Biology and Computer Science, McGill. * Between musical theater, computer science and the brain - I wasn’t able to chose so I will focus on one of their intersections: the physiology of spatial hearing. * I was born and raised in Belgium. However half of my family lives in Israel and I have spent most of my summers there. Today, the place I truly call home is definitely Montreal. ------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Alexandru Tecu ::: column-margin ![](images/alexandrusm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Alexandru" width="200"} ::: * B.A. Sc Neuroscience student, McGill University. * Currently completing my degree under the Neurophysiology/Neural Computational stream * [Email](mailto:alexandru.tecu.0@gmail.com) ----------------------------------------------------------- #### Youzhi Huang ::: column-margin ![](images/youzhism.png){fig-alt="Photo of Youzhi" width="200"} ::: * B.Sc. Student, Department of Psychology, McGill. * I am interested in the cognition aspect, it provides valuable insights into the workings of the human mind, explaining behavior, informing interventions, and advancing our understanding of various cognitive processes. * [Email](mailto:youzhi.huang@mail.mcgill.ca) --------------------------------------------------------- #### Bradley Austin-Keiller ::: column-margin ![](images/bradleysm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Bradley" width="200"} ::: * GrDip Music Therapy Student, Department of Fine Arts, Concordia * Joint B.A. in Psychology and Music, McGill * Combining a decade of musical training with clinical experience in a therapeutic context, I strive to bridge the gap by examining neural and physiological correlates of music therapy with a special focus on the intersection of music and health promotion. * [Email](mailto:Bradleyaustinkeiller@videotron.ca), [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bradley-austin-keiller-297787212/) --------------------------------------------------------- #### Anais Rubsamen ::: column-margin ![](images/anaissm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Anais" width="200"} ::: * B.A. Psychology student, McGill University * Over the short term, I wish to master software, technologies and techniques used in Psychology research and treatments, with a special focus on Python and R. Over the long term, I wish to develop strategies to improve the care of people living with psychopathologies and chronic pain, with a special focus on BPD. * [Email](mailto:anais.rubsamen@mail.mcgill.ca), [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/anaïs-issaeva-rubsamen-9ba222217/) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Lilia Fernane * U3 Neuroscience student, McGill University ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Yavuz Shahzad * U1 Psychology and Mathematics student, McGill University ------------------------------------------------------------------------ ### Where we are from Current / Past ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](members_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-1-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Alumni - PHGY 396 - Sean Solomon, Sarah Beydoun, Pegah Aghili - COMP 401 - Nevine Nzabonimpa - COGS 444 Injy Fouda - PSYC 395 Anais Rubsamen - Mackey-Glass research bursary -- Tim Yang - Undergraduate observers - Caden Welch, Max Tweedale, Elisa Niunin -------------------------------------------------- ### Us ::: {#photos layout-ncol="2"} ![Food, Fun](images/p2.png){fig-alt="lab1"} ![& French cricket in Quebec](images/p1.png){fig-alt="lab2"} :::
